name: TWSE MCP Server
what_it_does: Taiwan Stock Exchange (TWSE) MCP server enabling AI agents to access Taiwan stock market data — querying stock prices, company financial data, market indices (TAIEX), trading volumes, and Taiwan-listed company information from the official TWSE data source. Enables agents to research and analyze Taiwan equity markets.
use_cases: Querying Taiwan stock prices and market data from financial analysis agents
Accessing TWSE company financial reports from investment research agents
Monitoring Taiwan market indices (TAIEX, MSCI Taiwan) from market monitoring agents
Researching Taiwan-listed company fundamentals from equity analysis agents
Building Taiwan-specific investment dashboards from portfolio management agents
not_for: US, European, or other non-Taiwan stock markets (use appropriate regional exchange MCPs)
Real-time trade execution (TWSE data is informational; use licensed brokers for trading)
Teams without interest in Taiwan equity markets
best_when: An investor or financial analyst focusing on Taiwan markets needs AI assistance querying TWSE stock data — particularly useful for analyzing Taiwan semiconductor, technology, and electronics companies.
avoid_when: You invest in US or other non-Asian markets — use NYSE/NASDAQ, LSE, or Tokyo Stock Exchange MCPs for those markets.

auth.notes: No authentication required — TWSE open data API is publicly accessible. TWSE open data endpoints provide free access to Taiwan market data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: TWSE open data API is completely free
pricing.paid_tiers: None for open data; TWSE official data licensing available for commercial use
pricing.notes: TWSE provides free open data API. MCP server is free open source. Commercial bulk data usage may require TWSE licensing.

performance.rate_limits: TWSE open data has rate limits; query during market hours for real-time data

known_agent_gotchas: Some TWSE data is in Traditional Chinese — agents must handle Chinese text or translate
Market data only available during Taiwan market hours (UTC+8, weekdays)
TWSE stock codes are 4-digit numbers — different from US ticker format
Data coverage may not include OTC stocks (TPEX/Taipei Exchange is separate from TWSE)
Community MCP targeting Taiwan-specific market — limited English documentation
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS. No credentials. Public TWSE market data. No sensitive information. Taiwan data residency. Safe to query.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. No credentials. Public financial data. Taiwan data residency. No sensitive data.
